Handheld cinema verite photography, SCARLETT in loose linen shirt wading deeper through the shallows at the waterline, body angled mid-turn with muscles tensed and salt spray hitting the lens, Bondi Beach shoreline stretching into the distance with gentle waves lapping at her legs and pale sand visible beneath the clear water, soft ocean horizon under bright natural daylight, golden hour warmth across the scene with crisp directional shadows and immediate real light, dynamic micro-movement implied in a single frame, shallow depth of field pulling focus to the water interaction while softening the background promenade and distant surfers

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - Wide ocean-side promenade
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
